userText: Use the C# to develop a web program is inefficient.
correctedText: Using C# to develop web applications is inefficient.

issues.note: 'Use' as subject → 'Using'; a gerund (verb+-ing) is needed when a verb phrase acts as the subject
issues.suggestion: Sentence subject pattern: Using [tool/method] to [do something] is [adjective]

issues.note: 'the C#' → 'C#'; programming language and tool names don't take articles (Python, JavaScript, React, GitHub Copilot)
issues.suggestion: No article before: Python, C#, Java, React, Copilot, Git — treat them like proper nouns
